artist.description: Creator/author information stored in EXIF Artist.

attachment.description: The source image file used for EXIF extraction.

datetime-digitized.description: Timestamp when the image was digitized (EXIF DateTimeDigitized).

datetime-original.description: Timestamp when the image was originally captured (EXIF DateTimeOriginal).

focal-length.description: Lens focal length in millimeters (EXIF FocalLength).

gps-altitude.description: GPS altitude in meters from EXIF metadata.

gps-date-stamp.description: Date associated with EXIF GPS record.

gps-latitude.description: GPS latitude in decimal degrees from EXIF metadata.

gps-longitude.description: GPS longitude in decimal degrees from EXIF metadata.

image-description.description: Image description or caption stored in EXIF metadata.

iso-speed-ratings.description: ISO speed setting from EXIF metadata.

lens-model.description: Lens model used to capture the image.

orientation.description: Image orientation as stored in EXIF metadata.

raw-output.description: Raw EXIF output (e.g. JSON/text from extraction tool).

software.description: Software or firmware used to process the image.

tool.description: Tool used to extract EXIF metadata (e.g. exiftool).

user-comment.description: User comment stored in EXIF metadata.

description: Object describing EXIF metadata extracted from image files.
name: exif
